evals.prompt: Necesito exportar todos los iconos del design system de Figma. El archivo es https://www.figma.com/file/ABC123def/Design-System
evals.expected_output: Should extract the fileId 'ABC123def' from the URL. Should call figma_get with that fileId to inspect the file structure and find icon-related frames or components. Should identify the nodeIds of icon components/frames. Should then call figma_export with those nodeIds and SVG format (best for icons). Should return the export URLs.
assertions: Extracts fileId 'ABC123def' from the Figma URL
Calls figma_get first to inspect structure
Identifies icon nodes from the structure
Calls figma_export with the identified nodeIds

evals.prompt: Exportá el frame 'Hero Section' del archivo de Figma como PNG para usarlo de referencia.
evals.expected_output: Should ask for the fileId if not provided, or look for it in the conversation context. Should call figma_get to find the 'Hero Section' frame and get its nodeId. Should call figma_export with that nodeId and PNG format (raster, appropriate for reference screenshots). Should return the PNG URL.
assertions: Looks for fileId — asks if not provided
Calls figma_get to find the 'Hero Section' frame by name
Extracts the correct nodeId from the structure
Uses PNG format for raster reference

evals.prompt: ¿Qué páginas tiene el archivo de Figma? El fileId es XYZ789.
evals.expected_output: Should call figma_get with fileId 'XYZ789'. Should present the pages structure clearly — page names and the top-level frames/components within each page. Should not call figma_export (no export needed for inspection).
assertions: Does not call figma_export — only inspection was requested

evals.prompt: Exportá el componente de botón primario de Figma en todos los formatos posibles.
evals.expected_output: Should call figma_get first to identify the button component nodeId. Should then call figma_export 3 times (or explain it will export in SVG, PNG, and PDF). Should note that SVG is best for UI components, PNG for raster previews, PDF for documentation. Should return all 3 export URLs.
assertions: Calls figma_get to find the button component nodeId
Exports in SVG, PNG, and PDF formats
Notes which format is best for which use case
